verificationScope.tvi: Loaded the report-derived CSV through CurveStudio parseImportText, then ran buildDiagnosticRows with per-channel PrintSpec target TVI points.
verificationScope.labDeltaE: Recomputed CIE 1976 deltaE from the transcribed target and print Lab values.
verificationScope.substrate: Recomputed absolute L/a/b axis errors from the transcribed target and print Lab values.
verificationScope.grayBalance: Recomputed DeltaH as sqrt(deltaA^2 + deltaB^2), matching the photographed PrintSpec report values.
verificationScope.density: Loaded as report reference values only; CurveStudio does not yet have a dedicated PrintSpec density-audit module.

conclusion: The transcribed report data is internally consistent with CurveStudio's current TVI parser/diagnostic engine and with CIE 1976 Lab recomputation. The only gap is product scope: the photographed report is not a full CGATS/P2P measurement file, so CurveStudio cannot yet reproduce the full PrintSpec audit screen without a dedicated audit-report/example mode.
